productDisplayName: John Miller Men Striped Charcoal Trousers
description: Composition Charcoal grey formal trousers with like coloured stripes, made of 100% polyester, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered beside right pocket on the front, a buttoned welt pocket on the back, metal zip and button closure and extendible hems Fit Regular fit; Regular rise Wash care Hand wash or machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations These formal trousers from john miller will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear or any other formal occasion when you want to look your best without any effort. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
